about.heading: About Us
about.intro: We are committed to trust-led cooperative banking and inclusive economic growth.
about.mission: To deliver transparent and member-first financial solutions to farmers, workers, women, youth, and senior citizens.
about.vision: To become Maharashtra's most trusted cooperative credit society for responsible lending and community growth.

chairman.heading: Chairman Message
chairman.name: Prof. Sudhir Dattatray Saste
chairman.message: For more than a decade, our society has prioritized member trust, service quality, and disciplined financial growth. We remain committed to simple processes, faster service, and a stronger cooperative movement.
